events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario. It describes field review of Terminations & splices: expected unit in intended location, nameplates/orientation marks readable, housing and adjacent work no damage, matches referenced detail for rough-complete stage. Reference NEC 110.14. Need identify component/material/condition. The scenario seems positive: no defects. Decision pass. Risk low. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions none. Percent complete maybe 80? Value 0. Sound source etc default empty? Schema says string for sound_source, numbers for event_time, rate; order list; workable list. We can set sound_source: "", event_time: 0, rate: 0, order: [], workable: [], findings: [], actions: [], rationale: brief, references: ["NEC 110.14"]. Need ensure valid JSON. No prose outside.
